notes: Pirate-proposed smuggling runs: friendly bands (standing 10+) now post 🏴‍☠️ contraband contracts in the Escort offers. Run their unmarked weapons, narcotics, stolen AI cores, drones or plundered luxuries for ~1.5-2x the pay of a legit convoy and a big jump in crew standing — but the lanes carry law patrols too, delivery adds Wanted heat and Dread, and the destination's authorities won't forget. No Escort-Guild credit for dirty work, and bailing or losing the cargo burns the crew's trust. Builds on the 2.17 brotherhood (tags, locations, call-for-support).
